feat: implement grace note pairing state machine and centralize dialogs

Grace note flow (closes #111):
- Add GraceModeManager state machine (INACTIVE, GRACE_NOTE, INSERT, PAIRED, FINISH states)

- Add DISABLE_IN_GRACE_MODE flag to UIAction with message bus integration
- Route mouse/keyboard events through GraceModeManager in LineComponent
- Lock insertion x-position to grace note column in GRACE_NOTE_INSERT state
- Extract saveActionStates/restoreActionStates/clearSavedActionStates to SelectionCoordinator

Centralized dialog handling (closes #47):
- Add Dialogs utility class replacing all direct JOptionPane calls
- Migrate all actions, dialogs, and components to use Dialogs
- Suppress dialogs in headless/test contexts via Dialogs.setSuppressDialogs()

Tests:
- Add GraceModeManagerTest (unit), GraceNoteTest (e2e), InsertionSpacingCalculatorTest, DialogsTest
- Significantly expand E2ETest infrastructure (layout sync, coordinate helpers, @Nested support)
- Refactor existing e2e tests (GlissandoTest, TieTest, ToolbarReflectionTest, SelectionApplyTest)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.2.0: single-file IPC, append-only context.jsonl, heartbeat prompt in entity

Instance files reduced from 6 to 3 (manifest.json, kanban.md, context.jsonl):

- context.jsonl replaces inbox.jsonl + outbox.jsonl + context.json
  All events (user_input, turn, status, error, heartbeat_finished) flow
  through one append-only JSONL file; O(1) appends, never rewritten.
  UI derives display events via _to_display_events() in ipc.py.

- daemon.pid eliminated; PID stored in manifest.json["pid"]

- Heartbeat prompt moved from hardcoded Python to entity prompts/heartbeat.md
  Loaded via agent.yaml prompts.heartbeat field; Agent stores heartbeat_prompt.

Dead code removed:
- abstract/skill.py (BaseSkill) + Skill.to_prompt_fragment() — never called
- loaders/prompt.py (PromptLoader) — was just path.read_text()
- Instance.is_done(), Instance.close() — never called from server path
- All _syslog() calls and .nutshell_log system log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: auto-route venv to local disk, model cache to network volume

setup_runpod.sh now automatically:
- Detects network volume and symlinks .venv to /tmp (avoids MFS errors)
- Sets HF_HOME to /workspace/.cache/huggingface (model weights persist)
- Persists HF_HOME and UV_LINK_MODE in ~/.bashrc

Updated README pod spec to recommend Network Volume setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix image leak between add-item sessions — consolidate pendingAddImages

Two separate pendingAddImages arrays existed in images.js and add-item.js
that never synced. cropConfirm() pushed to images.js's array while
addItem() read from add-item.js's array, causing:
- Images from Item A appearing when creating Item B
- Removing images on Item B also removing them from Item A

Now a single array lives in images.js with exported getter/setter/clear
functions. add-item.js imports and re-exports them.

commit.message:
fix: DayTimeline auto-adjusts time range to fit actual activity data

The timeline bar was hardcoded to 6AM-10PM, so activity outside that
range (e.g. server in UTC showing 2AM local) was invisible. Now it
dynamically computes the visible range from the segment data with
1-hour padding on each side and a minimum 4-hour span.

commit.message:
perf: gate tcc compile against python3 subprocess time

Compile must beat python3 starting + running one subprocess call,
the fundamental op of a terminal-as-API script. If tcc is slower,
there's no speed advantage over all-python — build fails with PERF KILL.

v0.1.14 — SDD pipeline hardening + prompt engineering (R1-R5)

Prompt engineering:
- R1: pipeline context in all 7 personas (phase position + upstream/downstream)
- R2: auto-check "Before finalizing:" added to REASONING of all 7 personas
- R3: DevOps ROLE strengthened — final gate framing, dishonesty consequence
- R4: few-shot ❌/✅ examples in PM and Developer
- R5: positive constraints ("Always X") in all 7 personas

- extractRequirements() propagates no_go_zone, user_personas, user_stories (with concrete AC) to all downstream phases

commit.message:
fix: KDS order status actions pass location header — delete/resolve/retry now work

All action calls (delete, resolve, retry, bulk-delete, bulk-resolve)
were missing the X-Location-Id header. The backend commands filter by
location_id, so without the header ctx.locationId was undefined and the

commit.message:
Fix UTF-8 BOM contaminating openclaw.json and .env

PowerShell 5.1's Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 always writes BOM, which
causes container's Python init script to fail with "Unexpected UTF-8 BOM".
Use .NET's UTF8Encoding(false) to write files without BOM.

commit.message:
fix: convert postcss.config.ts to .js so PostCSS natively resolves Tailwind plugin

PostCSS does not natively support TypeScript config files. The .ts extension
was likely causing Railway builds to skip Tailwind processing, producing a
minimal CSS bundle without utility class definitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: full hardening pass — rate limits, sanitisation, file upload, env validation

Section 1: app.disable('x-powered-by') — remove Express fingerprint
Section 2: rate limiters updated to 15-min windows; dedicated aiLimiter (1hr/5)
           applied to /parse-resume and /resume/ai-rewrite before general limiter
Section 3: JWT_SECRET length >= 32 enforced at startup; no weak fallback exists
Section 4: sanitize-html installed; sanitize() helper added to candidate.js and
           employer.js; applied to all textarea/freeform text fields in PUT handlers
           and work experience repeater fields
Section 5: SQL injection audit — all queries use parameterised pool.execute(); no changes needed
Section 6: /dpr/:postId/resume ownership verified via getProfileId(req.user.user_id)
           (already present); confirmed all profile routes tied to JWT user_id
Section 7: magic-login and accept-invite SQL now filter AND used_at IS NULL AND
           expires_at > NOW() — DB enforces expiry, not just application code
Section 8: /dpr/:postId/resume now checks RESUME_ALLOWED_TYPES (PDF/DOC/DOCX);
           filename sanitized (strip non-alphanumeric chars) in both resume routes
Section 9: config/db.js connectionLimit 10→20; connectTimeout: 10000 added;
           DB indexes added in initDB() for otp_codes, magic_links, employer_team
Section 10: REQUIRED_ENV startup check (DB_HOST/NAME/USER/PASSWORD + JWT_SECRET);
            process.exit(1) if any missing or JWT_SECRET < 32 chars
Section 11: global error handler added (4-arg Express middleware) after 404 route;
            all existing catch blocks already use generic messages — no stack leaks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 1-2/1-5 페르소나 기반 학습 체크리스트 + 업셀 메시지 분기

  - 힌트 텍스트 + 예상 소요시간으로 다음 행동 유도

  - intermediate/advanced는 기존 원형 스텝 유지

commit.message:
fix(makefile): resolve pg_isready path on apple silicon and intel macs (#29)

detect postgresql@16 bin dir at make-eval time via ls, supporting both
/opt/homebrew (apple silicon) and /usr/local (intel) homebrew prefixes,
and use the full path in pg_isready/psql/createdb recipe commands so
/bin/sh invoked by make always finds the tools regardless of shell PATH

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: learning system — implicit feedback, memory extraction, session replay, analytics

Wire real quality signals into the routing fitness cache via implicit feedback
emitted after each CLI session. Add memory auto-extraction from session
resolution patterns, session replay APIs, and analytics endpoints with
dashboard panels.

Phase 1 - Fitness from real usage:
- CLI emits implicit quality feedback based on stop reason + branch detection
- Traffic refresh merges feedback quality via Bayesian blending (prior_weight=5)
- ClickHouse materialized view for hourly quality aggregation

Phase 2 - Memory auto-extraction:
- Heuristic extraction: next-steps, file co-modification patterns, resolutions
- Memory access tracking (access_count, last_accessed_at) in uglyhat

Phase 3 - Session replay:
- GET /api/v1/sessions — list sessions grouped by episode_id
- GET /api/v1/sessions/:episode_id — per-turn detail with feedback

Phase 4 - Analytics:
- GET /api/v1/analytics/quality-trends
- GET /api/v1/analytics/routing-savings (counterfactual via MODEL_CATALOG)
- GET /api/v1/analytics/session-efficiency
- Dashboard panels for all three analytics sections
